taskTemplate.name: Record Mortgage
taskTemplate.description: Prepare and submit the mortgage for recording with applicable riders and Exhibit A

subTaskTemplate.name: HELOC Rider
subTaskTemplate.description: HELOC Rider – Attach the HELOC Rider to the mortgage.

subTaskTemplate.name: Condo Rider
subTaskTemplate.description: Condo Rider – Attach the Condominium Rider to the mortgage.

subTaskTemplate.name: 1-to-4 Family Rider
subTaskTemplate.description: 1-to-4 Family Rider – Attach the 1-to-4 Family Rider to the mortgage.

subTaskTemplate.name: PUD Rider
subTaskTemplate.description: PUD Rider – Attach the Planned Unit Development (PUD) Rider to the mortgage.

subTaskTemplate.name: Second Home Rider
subTaskTemplate.description: Second Home Rider – Attach the Second Home Rider to the mortgage.

subTaskTemplate.name: Save Exhibit A
subTaskTemplate.description: Save Exhibit A – Save Exhibit A (legal description) with the mortgage package.

subTaskTemplate.name: Scan & Email Package
subTaskTemplate.description: Scan & Email Package – Scan the package with the mortgage riders and Exhibit A, then email it to Old Republic.

subTaskTemplate.name: FedEx Package
subTaskTemplate.description: FedEx Package – Send the physical package to Old Republic for recording via FedEx.
